title: Hi-C contact matrix — seq_hic
text: show multiple styles side--side, call seq_hic() multiple times combine via seq_resolve() %|%.

title: Hi-C contact matrix — seq_hic
code: library(GenomicRanges) set.seed(1) n  <- 80 st <- sort(sample(seq(1, 1e6, by = 1e4), n)) gr <- GRanges("chr1", IRanges(st, width = 1e4),               i_start = st, i_end = st + 1e4,               j_start = st + sample(0:5e5, n, replace = TRUE),               j_end   = st + sample(0:5e5, n, replace = TRUE) + 1e4,               score   = rexp(n, rate = 0.5)) win <- GRanges("chr1", IRanges(1, 1e6)) seq_hic(gr, windows = win, style = "triangle")

Recognised: stain. aesthetics Optional aes(): color (band border color, default "black"), linewidth (band border width, default 0.1), outline (nested aes() controlling chromosome's outer perimeter outline: sub-keys col, lwd, visible), highlight (nested aes() controlling scope = "full" highlight rectangle: sub-keys fill, col, lwd, alpha), telomere.radius (numeric; corner radius fraction band height style = "rounded"; 1.0 = full half-circle cap). scope Character. One "window" (default — bands overlapping track windows drawn) "full" (whole chromosome drawn rescaled fill panel; current window region overlaid translucent highlight rectangle). style Character. One "block" (default — rectangular bands) "rounded" (rounded telomere caps leftmost rightmost bands). highlight_range Optional GRanges. honoured scope = "full". set, highlight rectangle marks range instead parent track's windows. Lets set track's windows span full chromosome (x-axis reads chromosome coordinates) still highlighting sub-range. ... Reserved.

Default 0. orientation Character. One "horizontal" "vertical". Controls whether keys laid row column. NULL (default), orientation inferred side: "vertical" side %% c("left", "right"), "horizontal" otherwise. nrow Integer NULL. Number rows key grid. nrow ncol NULL, defaults 1 row (keys one row horizontal orientation) 1 column (keys one column vertical orientation). ncol Integer NULL. Number columns key grid. side Character NULL. position %% c("track_margin", "canvas_margin"), margin target. One "top", "bottom", "left", "right". NULL, defaults "top" margin positions left NULL "inside".

Default FALSE. ... Additional arguments reserved future use.

what: Preview a SeqPlotR plot as a circos layout — seq_preview_circos
title: Preview a SeqPlotR plot as a circos layout — seq_preview_circos
text: Renders schematic circular layout — data required. track shown colored arc sector. Rows (defined via direction = "" / %__%) map concentric rings outer inner; tracks within row (defined via direction = "right" / %|%) map arc sectors angular width proportional track_width. Ring radial thickness proportional maximum track_height row. positional layouts supported — plot built patchwork layout string natural circos interpretation rejected.

title: Preview a SeqPlotR plot as a circos layout — seq_preview_circos
code: seq_preview_circos(   plot_obj = NULL,   labels = TRUE,   colors = NULL,   start_angle = 90,   end_angle = -270,   gap_degrees = 2,   ring_gap = 0.02,   outer_radius = 0.45,   inner_radius = 0.08,   cx = 0.5,   cy = 0.5 )

title: Preview a SeqPlotR plot as a circos layout — seq_preview_circos
text: plot_obj seq_plot object built operator chain. Required. labels Logical. Draw track_id labels. Default TRUE. colors Optional named character vector mapping track IDs fill colors. Unspecified IDs receive automatic colors. start_angle Numeric clock-face degrees first sector starts. Default 90 (top). Sectors sweep clockwise (decreasing angle). end_angle Numeric clock-face degrees last sector ends. Default -270 (full circle = start_angle - 360). gap_degrees Numeric blank gap degrees sectors ring. Default 2. ring_gap Numeric npc blank gap concentric rings. Default 0.02. outer_radius Numeric npc radius outermost ring's outer edge. Default 0.45. inner_radius Numeric npc radius innermost ring's inner edge. Default 0.08. cx, cy Numeric npc coordinates circle centre. Default (0.5, 0.5).

title: Preview a SeqPlotR plot as a circos layout — seq_preview_circos
text: Named list polar bounding boxes (invisibly). entry list(theta0, theta1, r0, r1) clock-face degrees npc radii, keyed track ID.

title: Preview a SeqPlotR plot as a circos layout — seq_preview_circos
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ p <- seq_plot() %|%   seq_track(track_id = "Chr1", track_width = 3) %|%   seq_track(track_id = "Chr2", track_width = 2) %|%   seq_track(track_id = "Chr3", track_width = 1) %__%   seq_track(track_id = "Signal") %__%   seq_track(track_id = "CopyNum") seq_preview_circos(plot_obj = p) } # }

what: IGV-style read alignment track element — seq_reads
title: IGV-style read alignment track element — seq_reads
text: Renders read alignments indexed BAM file chevron polygons (pointing right + strand reads, left −). Mate pairs optionally connected thin horizontal line. Reads loaded construction time cached element; requested windows pulled.

title: IGV-style read alignment track element — seq_reads
code: seq_reads(   bam,   region,   min_mapq = 0L,   max_reads = 20000L,   max_width = 100000L,   sort_by = c("insert_length", "start"),   link_mates = TRUE,   show_strand = TRUE,   aesthetics = list() )

title: IGV-style read alignment track element — seq_reads
text: bam Character. Path indexed BAM file. region GRanges windows load. Every window must ≤ max_width bp. min_mapq Integer. Minimum mapping quality. Default 0. max_reads Integer. Maximum total reads load (qname-aware downsampling preserves mate pairs). Default 20000. max_width Integer. Maximum allowed window width bp. Default 100000. Prevents accidental loading entire chromosomes. sort_by Character. Row-packing sort order: "insert_length" (default — longest inserts top) "start" (leftmost reads top). link_mates Logical. Draw horizontal line connecting mated pair's outer extent. Default TRUE. show_strand Logical. Draw chevron arrowheads indicating strand. Default TRUE. aesthetics Named list. Supported keys: fill_plus, fill_minus, fill_unstranded, col, lwd, row_gap, tip_mm, tip_min_body_mm, link_col, link_lwd, link_lty.

what: Compose wrapper-built plots into a parent plot — seq_resolve
title: Compose wrapper-built plots into a parent plot — seq_resolve
text: wrapper (e.g. seq_copynumber(), seq_hic(), seq_chip()) returns seq_plot. seq_resolve() unpacks child plots parent seq_plot, letting combine heterogeneous track stacks single figure.

title: Compose wrapper-built plots into a parent plot — seq_resolve
code: seq_resolve(parent, ..., direction = "under")

title: Compose wrapper-built plots into a parent plot — seq_resolve
text: parent seq_plot object add tracks . ... One seq_plot objects produced wrapper functions. direction "" (default) "right". See Details.

title: Compose wrapper-built plots into a parent plot — seq_resolve
text: modified parent, invisibly (R6 reference semantics).

title: Compose wrapper-built plots into a parent plot — seq_resolve
text: Tracks child appended parent respecting original row grouping. direction argument controls first row child lands relative current bottom parent: "" — start new row whatever already parent (common case). "right" — append current row (put child beside already ). Subsequent rows within child always placed "" (.e. child's internal row structure preserved). Multiple children supplied one call stacked order, direction applied children. Plot-level links annotations carried children transferred parent document order. Duplicate track_ids across children cause error — pass unique track_id values wrapper call resolve conflict.

title: Compose wrapper-built plots into a parent plot — seq_resolve
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ win <- GRanges("chr1", IRanges(1, 1e6)) cn  <- seq_copynumber(cn_gr, windows = win, track_id = "CN") hic <- seq_hic(hic_gr, windows = win, style = "triangle",                track_id = "HiC") seq_resolve(seq_plot(), cn, hic)$plot() } # }

code: seq_scale_continuous(   limits = NULL,   n_breaks = 5,   breaks = NULL,   minor_breaks = NULL,   expand = c(0.025, 0),   cap = c("capped", "full", "exact", "ticks"),   labels = NULL,   oob = c("exclude", "perimeter"),   pretty = NULL )

title: Continuous position scale — seq_scale_continuous
text: limits Optional numeric vector length 2 clamping axis range. NULL, range auto-computed element data. n_breaks Target number pretty breaks (default 5). Ignored breaks supplied. breaks Optional numeric vector explicit break positions. minor_breaks Optional scalar (number sub-divisions major breaks) numeric vector explicit minor-break positions. expand Length-2 c(mul, add) specifying padding around data range. mul multiplied diff(data_range); add added data units. Default c(0.025, 0) — 2.5% breath. cap One "capped" (default — axis line spans break range, tick labels look stranded), "full" (spans expanded plot range), "exact" (spans unexpanded data range), "ticks" (suppress axis line entirely). labels Optional character vector tick labels (length breaks). NULL, breaks formatted automatically.

NULL, level names used labels. expand Length-2 c(mul, add) expansion. Default c(0, 0.5) (half category padding side). cap Axis-line cap mode. See seq_scale_continuous().

code: seq_scale_genomic(   windows = NULL,   scale_factor = NULL,   breaks = NULL,   minor_breaks = NULL,   expand = c(0, 0),   cap = c("capped", "full", "exact", "ticks"),   labels = NULL,   oob = c("exclude", "perimeter"),   pretty = NULL )

title: Genomic position scale — seq_scale_genomic
text: windows GRanges object defining genomic windows. scale_factor Numeric vector per-window scale factors controlling unit label (1e-6 = Mb, 1e-3 = kb, 1 = bp). NULL, reads mcols(windows)$scale defaults 1e-6. breaks Optional numeric vector explicit break positions. supplied, used instead pretty()-generated breaks. minor_breaks Optional scalar (number sub-divisions major breaks) numeric vector explicit minor-break positions. expand Length-2 c(mul, add) specifying multiplicative additive padding around data range. Default c(0, 0) genomic (windows already set visible range). cap One "capped" (axis line spans break range), "full" (spans expanded plot range), "exact" (spans unexpanded data range), "ticks" (axis line, ticks). labels Optional character vector tick labels (length breaks). NULL, breaks formatted decimal numbers. oob One "exclude" (default — --bounds data rows dropped npc transform; message() reports count) "perimeter" (clamped axis limits counted). pretty Optional named list arguments forwarded base pretty() (e.g. list(min.n = 2, high.u.bias = 0)). Names base pretty() arguments (bounds f.min) error R.

what: IGV-style nucleotide sequence track element — seq_sequence
title: IGV-style nucleotide sequence track element — seq_sequence

title: IGV-style nucleotide sequence track element — seq_sequence
text: data Ignored; sequence fetched genome sequence. mapping Ignored. aesthetics Optional SeqAes. Supports color (letter color, defaults matching rectangle fill), background (letter background rectangle color, default NA). genome Character. BSgenome package name (e.g. "BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38"). Required sequence NULL. sequence Character string nucleotides spanning first window. provided, genome ignored. show_letters Logical. Show nucleotide letters window width <= 80 bp. Default FALSE. rect_height Numeric (0, 1] NULL. Fraction track height used rectangles. Default NULL (full track height). colors Named character vector mapping nucleotide codes hex colors. Defaults UCSC standard: ="#00AA00", T="#FF0000", C="#0000FF", G="#FFB300". ... Reserved.

what: Cubic-Bezier string link between two genomic loci — seq_string
title: Cubic-Bezier string link between two genomic loci — seq_string
text: Draws smooth Bezier curve connecting two anchors. aes(type = "auto") (default), C vs. S shape inferred resolved strand0/strand1 fields — opposing strands (+/-, -/+) produce S-curve, matching strands produce C-curve.

Locked parent track added inside seq_track(). aesthetics Optional aes(): color (default "purple"), linewidth (default 1.5), alpha (default 0.8), type ("auto", "c", "s"; default "auto"), bulge, orientation. ... Reserved.

title: Filled trapezoid connecting two tracks — seq_synteny
text: Draws filled quadrilateral whose bottom edge spans region track t0 whose top edge spans homologous region track t1. Use highlight syntenic blocks, orthologous segments, otherwise paired intervals across two stacked tracks.

Must match data length. ... Additional arguments reserved future use.

title: Create a new seq_track — seq_track
text: track cell partitioned five nested zones: Track outer margin — outermost band track cell; reserved axis titles derived track mapping. Track inner margin — separates titles window row. Window outer margin — per-window spacer inside track plot region. Window inner margin — per-window band holding axis lines, ticks, tick labels. Plot area — elements render.

title: Create a new seq_track — seq_track
code: seq_track(   data = NULL,   mapping = NULL,   aesthetics = aes(),   windows = NULL,   track_id = NULL,   direction = "right",   track_width = 1,   track_height = 1,   scale_x = NULL,   scale_y = NULL,   scale_x2 = NULL,   scale_y2 = NULL,   y_windows = NULL,   y_windows2 = NULL,   track_outer_margin = 0.02,   track_inner_margin = 0.02,   window_outer_margin = 0,   window_inner_margin = 0.02,   window_margin = NULL,   combine_windows = FALSE,   combine_y_windows = FALSE,   flip_x = FALSE,   flip_y = FALSE,   elements = list(),   show_legend = TRUE,   window_scale = NULL,   ... )

title: Create a new seq_track — seq_track
text: data GRanges object providing default data elements track. mapping SeqMap object map() providing default aesthetic mappings. aesthetics SeqAes object aes() providing constant aesthetics. windows GRanges object defining genomic windows track. Elements define windows — place windows set. track_id Character. Unique identifier track, used patchwork layout matching cross-track link references. direction One "right" (append current row) "" (start new row). Ignored first track (always top-left) seq_plot() given layout string. track_width Relative width unit within row. Default 1. track_height Relative height unit within column. Default 1. scale_x Optional position scale primary x axis — seq_scale_genomic() (default behaviour NULL), seq_scale_continuous(limits = ...) scalar data x, seq_scale_discrete(levels = ...) categorical x. scale_y Optional position scale primary y axis. Pass seq_scale_genomic(y_windows) flip track genomic position runs along y; continuous / discrete scales supported . scale_x2, scale_y2 Optional position scales secondary x y axes. Elements routed secondary axis via map(axis.x = 2) map(axis.y = 2) positioned scales. NULL, secondary scales auto-inferred contributing elements layoutGrid() time. y_windows Optional GRanges used genomic y-axis range flipping track. Setting (SeqScaleGenomic scale_y) auto-enables uses_genomic_y. y_windows2 Optional GRanges secondary genomic y axis. track_outer_margin Per-track outer margin npc units. Scalar, length-4 c(bottom, left, top, right) (base-R par(mar = ...) order), named list top, right, bottom, left. Default 0.02. Axis titles draw . track_inner_margin Per-track inner margin. form track_outer_margin. Default 0.02. window_outer_margin Per-window outer margin. form. Default 0. Optional spacer around window. window_inner_margin Per-window inner margin. form. Default 0.02. Axis ticks tick labels draw . window_margin Deprecated. Use aes("window.gap.width" = <value>) plot track aesthetics control inter-window gap. Passing non-NULL value emits deprecation warning otherwise ignored. combine_windows Logical. TRUE, multi-region windows concatenated single virtual panel — useful drawing data spans regions (e.g. inter-chromosomal Hi-C contacts) one continuous track. original window's axis labels title still drawn, separated thin boundary marker. Default FALSE (multi-region windows render separate panels). combine_y_windows Logical. Symmetric combine_windows genomic y-axis (relevant tracks multiple y_windows). Default FALSE. flip_x, flip_y Logical. TRUE, mirror x y axis low data values render high end panel vice versa. Tick labels follow orientation. elements Optional list SeqElement / SeqLink objects pre-populate track. Elements can also added via addElement() %+% operator. show_legend Logical. FALSE, track contributes legend keys regardless element legend fields. Default TRUE. window_scale Numeric vector NULL. Per-window x-axis scale factors (e.g. 1e-6 Mb, 1e-3 kb, 1 bp). NULL (default), scale inferred narrowest window. Length 1 applies value windows; length equal number windows uses values positionally; length triggers warning recycles rep_len(). ... Additional arguments reserved future use.

what: Zoom / highlight polygon between two tracks — seq_zoom
title: Zoom / highlight polygon between two tracks — seq_zoom
